summary: Comprehensive testing of Guided Journey app iteration 2 completed successfully. All 4 new features (analytics dashboard, user search/filter, CMS editor, partner-user linking) are working correctly. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend features fully integrated.

design_issues.issue: Minor console warnings about missing Description for DialogContent components

passed_tests: Backend API health check (22/22 endpoints passing including new analytics and search)
Admin login with admin@example.com / Admin123! redirects to /admin dashboard
Admin Dashboard tab shows 4 stats cards (Total Users: 4, Active Partners: 3, Submissions: 0, New 7 days: 5)
Admin Dashboard tab displays Step Completion Rates with progress bars for all 4 steps
Admin Dashboard tab shows User Distribution (Regular Users: 4, Partner Users: 0, Admins: 1)
Admin Users tab search input filters users by name/email
Admin Users tab role filter dropdown works (All, User, Admin, Partner)
Admin Users tab View button opens user detail dialog with editable progress status dropdowns
Admin Partners tab 'Link User' button opens dialog to assign users to partners
Admin Partners tab shows linked user information and unlink functionality
Admin CMS tab shows editable fields for Home/Hero (hero_title, hero_subtitle, hero_cta)
Admin CMS tab shows editable fields for About Us and Partners sections
Admin CMS tab Save Changes button updates content successfully
CMS changes reflect on landing page after save (tested with hero title update)
Landing page loads with updated content from CMS
Landing page navigation works (Home, About Us, Partners sections)
Landing page shows 3 partner cards with categories
API GET /api/admin/analytics returns analytics data with step completion rates
API GET /api/admin/users/search?q=admin returns filtered results
API GET /api/admin/users/search?role=admin returns role-filtered results
API PUT /cms/home updates content and reflects on frontend

success_percentage.backend: 100% (22/22 API endpoints passing including new analytics and search features)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all 4 new features working: analytics dashboard, user search/filter, CMS editor, partner-user linking)
